$comment: deploy config for the read-only datum tower (feature #8 / deploy PRD). The deployable artifact is a STATIC bundle: the files listed in `assets` are published to any static host, NO node server required. When no live bus is reachable, the page hydrates from snapshot.json (the seeded v8 end-state baked by demo/seed-snapshot.ts). If a live DATUM_BUS_URL is configured, the same page upgrades to live /stream SSE.
name: datum-tower
description: Static read-only tower: shows the workspace registry at v8 with no bus process.

host.$comment: Pick one and freeze before recording (deploy PRD open question). Cloudflare Pages chosen: pure static, global edge, zero node runtime needed for the snapshot path. Swap `provider`/`project` for your account.

live_bus.$comment: Optional: set DATUM_BUS_URL (build-time env for serve.ts, or a runtime proxy) to upgrade the deployed page from the static snapshot to live SSE. SSE over the static host may not be allowed (deploy PRD risk) — ship snapshot-only on the live URL and demo live SSE locally.
